message.content:
@startuml
actor nsq participant "GuideTaskCrmVisitAssignListener" as listener 
participant guideTaskCrmVisitAssignProcessor processor GuideTaskAssignDomainService domain ShoppingGuideReadApi api GuideTaskDepartmentAssignStrategy strategy GuideTaskAssignFactory factory GuideTaskAssignRepository assignRepo GuideTaskRepository taskRepo NsqProducer producer 

listener ->>processor : 1下发任务
activate processor 
processor->domain:2开始处理
domain-->strategy:3任务分配
note right of domain #palegreen#:下发给所有部门#
note left of strategy:paleyellow:#只有任务下发给导购的时候才创建导购的任务明细#
api<-domain:4查询下发对象department
domain<--factory:5分配任务
factory<<-assignRepo:6创建分配的任务实体
frame Transaction {
    activate transactionFrame
   } else { deactivate transactionFrame }
end frame
transactionFrame <- - >taskRepo:7保存分配状态status flow任务流转至分配完成
taskRepo < -- >>producer:8发送下发完成消息，准备启动任务
@enduml
